body:
Writing This From My College Balcony.
https://open.spotify.com/track/2V52z8vGuwZz1jcZnIGwIc?si=f64a98c141ee47da

Today marks the true end of my college days. The floors swept. The garbage tossed. The bed stripped. I will miss it dearly.

- CJR 7/20/2026.
The quick brown fox jumped over the lazy dog.
